---
title: "patch_gravity_db.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/patch_gravity_db.ts"
loc: 23
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.25
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.15
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)

### Exports
- `statsDir`
- `dbPath`
- `db`
